mapper.select: SELECT id, patient_name, department_name, doctor_name, fee, status FROM registrations ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, patient_name, department_name, doctor_name, fee, status FROM registrations WHERE patient_name = #{patientName} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, patient_name, department_name, doctor_name, fee, status FROM registrations WHERE doctor_name = #{doctorName} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO registrations (patient_name, department_name, doctor_name, fee, status) VALUES (#{patientName}, #{departmentName}, #{doctorName}, #{fee}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE registrations SET patient_name = #{patientName}, department_name = #{departmentName}, doctor_name = #{doctorName}, fee = #{fee}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
